props.title: Action Dispatch
props.description: Action dispatch with state feedback — button click saves a timestamp to the store.
props.technicalDescription:
Spec
CaseContainer → StackRow → [EditToggle, ActionButton("Save Document"), BoundField(bind: "/savedAt")]
State
{} initially; at runtime: savedAt (ISO timestamp), editingSection, _snapshot
Features
• Action dispatch — on.click triggers handler via emit system
• setState in handlers — writes to store at arbitrary paths
• BoundField — one-way display of handler-computed values
